name: @pippit-bridge/opencode-provider
description: OpenCode auth and native video tools for Pippit (小云雀)

scripts.prepack: npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/core && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/sdk && npm run build
scripts.pretest: npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/core && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/sdk
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/core && npm run build -w @pippit-bridge/sdk
